Bright, juicy, and irresistible, this fragrance captures the essence of island life with notes reminiscent of fresh mango, pineapple, and other tropical delights. It’s playful, uplifting, and perfect for anyone who wants to carry a piece of Jamaica wherever they go.

Whether you're treating yourself or gifting someone special, Island Vybz is more than skincare, it’s a whole mood.

additionalInfoDescription1:
Our Glow Therapy soap offers a range of benefits for the skin, thanks to the natural properties of hibiscus flowers. Here are some of the advantages:

Hydration: Hibiscus is known for its moisturizing properties, which can help keep the skin hydrated and prevent dryness. Using hibiscus soap can leave your skin feeling soft and smooth.

Antioxidant-rich: Hibiscus is packed with antioxidants such as vitamin C and anthocyanins, which help combat free radicals and prevent oxidative stress on the skin. This can help reduce signs of aging like wrinkles and fine lines.

Exfoliation: The natural acids present in hibiscus flowers gently exfoliate the skin, removing dead skin cells and promoting cell turnover. This can result in a brighter, more radiant complexion.

Acne-fighting: Hibiscus has natural antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties, making it effective in combating acne-causing bacteria and reducing inflammation. Regular use of hibiscus soap can help prevent breakouts and keep the skin clear.

Toning: Hibiscus has astringent properties that help tighten the skin and minimize the appearance of pores. Using  soap with hibiscus can help tone and firm the skin, giving it a more youthful appearance.

Gentle on the skin: Our soap is formulated with natural ingredients and is gentle on the skin, making it suitable for all skin types, including sensitive skin.

Light fragrance: Our soap is scented with a blend of Vetiver and Lavender essential oils which is a pleasant, floral scent that can leave your skin delicately fragranced after use.

Overall, incorporating our Glow Therapy soap into your skincare routine can help nourish, protect, and rejuvenate your skin, leaving it looking and feeling healthier.
